excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

If you are having trouble loading boards, don’t worry our developers are on it and everything should be up and running soon!

You can follow updates on the status page → https://status.monday.com/

Hang tight!

posts.author: AnnRVA (Ann Myers)
posts.cookedHtml: The status page says this is has been resolved. I’m still having issues.
